---
title: "Events"
---

## 2026 Marquette City Nature Challenge Events

Click on an event to learn more

| Time | April 24 | April 25 | April 26 | April 27 |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 8 am |  |  |  |  |
| 9 am |  |  |  |  |
| 10 am |  |  |  |  |
| 11 am |  |  |  |  |
| 12 pm |  |  | [Lilly Pond Trail Observation Walk](event_flyers/con1.png) |  |
| 1 pm |  |  | [Hawk walk](event_flyers/hawk.png) |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |
| 2 pm |  |  |  |  |
| 3 pm |  |  |  |  |
| 4 pm | [Stream Macroinvertebrates](event_flyers/mccd.png) | [Fungi Walk](event_flyers/fung.png) |  |  |
| 5 pm | [Plant Walk](event_flyers/mccd.png) |  |  |  |
| 6 pm |  | [Presque Isle Bog Macroinvertebrates](event_flyers/ent.png) |  |  |
| 7 pm |  |  |  |  |
| 8 pm |  | [Night Ecology: Moths and Amphibians](event_flyers/night.png) |  |  |
